param_input_item.param_description: a handle object: scalar or matrix.

description.p: delete(h) removes from memory the handle objects referenced by h.
When deleted, any references to the objects in h become invalid.
For classdef handle objects, delete calls the class destructor method when it exists and notifies ObjectBeingDestroyed before the object becomes invalid.
For handle arrays, each valid element is deleted.
To remove the handle variables, use the clear function.
See clear function about how to force delete with clear function.

history_item.history_description: classdef handle destructor and handle array behavior documented
